use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms, dialogs, and page actions
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and navigation
Secondary/ghost buttons for less prominent actions in UI workflows
Loading state indicators for async operations like form submissions
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (sm, default, lg, xl, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition and CVA for variant management. Supports loading states and icon slots for flexible icon placement. Standard focus and hover accessibility states included.
